sql_array: CREATE TABLE Products (ProductID INT PRIMARY KEY, ProductName VARCHAR(255), Description TEXT);
INSERT INTO Products (ProductID, ProductName, Description) VALUES (1, 'Abacus', 'Device for calculation'), (2, '        ', 'Empty Product'), (3, NULL, 'Null Product Descr');
SELECT length(ProductName), bif:crc64(length(ProductName)) AS name_hash FROM Products WHERE ProductID = (SELECT MAX(ProductID) FROM Products WHERE ProductName IS NOT NULL);
SELECT length(Description) AS desc_length, bif:crc64(length(Description)) AS desc_hash FROM Products GROUP BY desc_length HAVING desc_length > 0;
SELECT P.ProductID, length(P.ProductName) AS name_length, bif:crc64(length(P.ProductName)) FROM Products P JOIN (SELECT MAX(ProductID) AS max_id FROM Products) AS sub ON P.ProductID = sub.max_id;
SELECT ProductID, length(ProductName) AS name_length FROM Products WHERE length(ProductName) = (SELECT MAX(length(ProductName)) FROM Products);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS NULL_count FROM Products WHERE ProductName IS NULL OR ProductName = '';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE TempProducts AS SELECT ProductID, bif:crc64(length(ProductName)) AS product_hash FROM Products WHERE length(ProductName) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT TP.product_hash, COUNT(*) FROM TempProducts TP GROUP BY TP.product_hash HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
